title: CMC Vellore Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: CMC Vellore Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? CMC Vellore Capital India in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CMC Vellore Capital India:
CMC Vellore Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore Capital India!
